subTitle: Vibhuti accidentally receives female hormones during blood donation. He boasts about it to Angoori as she tries on new bangles.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Ammaji interrupts Vibhuti's poetry for Angoori and Tiwari's daydream about Anita. Later, she feeds Tiwari dry fruits, wanting grandchildren.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Saxena prevents Tiwari from open defecation. Subsequently, Tiwari, seeking to evict Ammaji, instructs David to harass her.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Ammaji's flirtation with David causes interuption in Tiwari's eviction plan. Meanwhile, Anita and Vibhuti quarrel over a trivial matter.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti plots to illegally acquire and smuggle wood internationally. Soon after, a rival confronts him, demanding a share of the illicit gains.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti's journey is interrupted by Happu at a police stop. Concurrently, Tiwari confides in Anita, stressing his urgent need for her.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti gifts Happu a special perfume while Tiwari secretly records this. Later, Tiwari adopts a new identity to challenge Vibhuti's business ventures.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Tiwari, in the guise of a South Indian businessman, confidently informs Vibhuti that they are to split their earnings. Subsequently, Vibhuti devises a scheme to abduct him.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Angoori worries about Tiwari's absence and tells Happu about it. Simultaneously, Vibhuti discovers Tiwari has freed himself from captivity.

title: Fukrey Returns
subTitle: Bholi Punjaban is back with a vengeance for round two of mischief, mayhem, and a get-rich-quick extravaganza with Hunny, Zafar, Lali, and deja choo expert Choocha.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: In an attempt to socialise more, Anita invites Angoori and Manmohan over for dinner. Meanwhile, Vibhuti makes arrangements to cook in an effort to impress Angoori.

title: Man Mohini
subTitle: Ram's decision to shelter Mohini in the palace triggers unexplainable incidents and visions of the past. Later, a furious Devki orders Mohini to leave the palace.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Frustrated by the blackouts, everyone urges Pandit Ji to restore the power. Later, Manmohan instructs Saxena to sneak out at night and sever Vibhuti's power line.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti hosts a celebration for Tekayah at home, where Happu arrives to offer his congratulations. Meanwhile, Anita and Tiwari reach a breaking point and decide to file for a divorce.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti, posing as Santa, convinces Angoori of his wish-granting powers. Meanwhile, David intercepts Tiwari's gift intended for Anita.

subTitle: Vibhuti questions Tiwari about gifting a girl's dress to David. Pressured, Tiwari reluctantly gives David the gift he originally bought for Anita.
